reviews.review_description: Fun game but arcade mode is broken and the campaign is short
Can you save your game. If yes, how?
Very cool game visuals and gameplay
This game is so good, I bought it in the sale at a bargain price and played it more than my more expensive purchases. It's a one more go game. Buy it you won't regret it.

reviews.review_title: First 5 star rating I've ever given!
reviews.review_description: I am normally very picky about games and I never give 5 stars but this game is so fun for its small price of $10 (got it on sale for $8) I've already almost finished the campaign and I can't wait to jump into arcade mode. It has fun and vibrant graphics along with good sound design and level design. The enemies are unique with different attacks and the final fight is hard but fun. Power-ups are fun as well and in some moments you feel like a god mowing down all the poor little things shooting at you. 10/10 would recommend, amazing experience for a small price.
Quirky yet challenging and addictive.  Worth every cent!
A short but fun fun shooter.
I was hesitant to buy the game because it looked to easy but once I played I was hooked it is such a fun game and also a bit of a challenge grat for all ages.

I played this game as a kid on my parents phone when I first saw it and I fell in love with it. The play style of the never ending action and get upgrades and stronger against multiple enemy’s and the pixel art of the character and levels made me fall in love with ShootySkies and even to this day I still play ShootySkies. I was browsing the store as I was looking for something fun to play and in complete shock and confusion I saw a ShootySkies game in VR and I was overly exhilarated. As I bought the game I spent at least two hours and those are two hours of pure bliss. I was freaking out about seeing everything as if it was in real life seeing all the levels, bosses, enemies, and character in VR was the coolest thing ever! I totally recommend the game if you like action shooters for sure. And I don’t wanna be rude but to the creators could we get like a nightmare level? I am a little bit of a ShootySkies veteran and the VR is not too hard even on the max difficulty. Sorry to judge but nevertheless I love this game and totally recommend!
If you like cats and the 80's then you will like this!
This game is perfect! I love the art style and the gameplay is on point! Also, you can play this game has a lot of gameplay. So this is a good first choice for Vr beginners.
This game stinks!

I'm from the time of Galaga and Pac-Man 
I must say at first it looked a little cheesy but now I'm convinced this game has the look and feel of old school arcade on steroids. I worked up a sweat in chill mode. The campaign is challenging enough to keep you coming back.
Love this game. So much fun.  The graphics are funny and the gameplay is very challenging, even on the easiest level.  Don’t hesitate. Get this!
Purchased.  Never played and will not open.

Watching the trailer and reading some (great) reviews did not adequately prepare me for how much fun I would have with this super-affordable game!

The animation, different worlds, music, and weapons are all so creative and fun. I constantly have a big grin on my face playing this game!

Get it.

I love playing this game. It’s kinda challenging, and made very beautifully. But I haven’t gave up yet. I can’t seem to pass the 1st world 😞. I guess I’m just not a good enough player. But if you like a good challenge buy this game and you won’t regret it.

This game was extremely fun. I enjoyed it so much. Because it's from the creators of crossy road I really really liked the block feeling and the arcade style game. this is unlike any other stand in one spot shooter game this is a once in a lifetime opportunity that is incredibly incredibly cool. I would definitely recommend this game to anybody new to VR or looking for a cheap budget game. I would even buy this game for $20 because that's how good I thought it was. But if you wait for this game to go on a sale then you could get it for a whole lot cheaper. It's definitely worth the 10 bucks that it is. you get to choose characters unlock them do special challenges receive highest scores there's five different unique worlds to explore there's just so much to offer for a  game that's $10. When you think about how much effort and work is put into these games which is like hours months even years perhaps and they're selling it for $10 or even more you really begin to appreciate the hard work the creators put into these thank you so much for the amazing game.!!!!

Simple but effective controls and classic gameplay make it easy and fun for people to pick up and enjoy right away.  It has a fun and vibrant color palette that reminds me of neon meets Lego Movie.  I would strongly recommend this game.

This game is for the retro gamers its a very fun game u have to concentrate the graphics are cool it has plenty of monsters to shoot it is worth the discounted price i got it for today will he playing alot
